scope: I组第二轮法国vs伊拉克、挪威vs塞内加尔量化再预测；不进入第三轮预测，不给投注建议。

input_readiness.label: partial
available_inputs: public odds snippets retained from baseline
missing_or_stale_inputs: data refresh file exists but remains skeleton/in_progress with empty matches
tactical refresh file exists but remains skeleton/in_progress with empty matches

method.summary: Use 2026-06-21 quantitative baseline as prior, then apply local player_state and first-round postmatch calibration. Generate 0-0 to 5-5 Poisson matrix from final xG and derive 1X2/totals from a fuller Poisson grid; preserve 5+ tail in matrix.
method.double_counting_guard: First-round events are used once through player_state/round1 correction. Public odds are market calibration only, not factual truth and not betting advice.

matches.venue_note: Philadelphia Stadium / Lincoln Financial Field, Philadelphia

baseline_strength.notes: France retains very large squad-strength and tournament-quality advantage.

recent_round1_form.notes: France beat Senegal 3-1 and showed late-game expansion; Iraq lost 1-4 and low-block durability fell after conceding.

player_state.france: Mbappe 5.0, Olise 5.0, Barcola 5.0, Rabiot 4.0; several unused rotation players available but lineups unknown.
player_state.iraq: Aymen Hussein and Al-Ammari positive; Jalal Hassan post-error state low; back line state mostly 2.0 after 1-4.

availability_and_injury.france: No confirmed new absence in local files; Saliba/Dembele/Doue workload still requires T-75m check.
availability_and_injury.iraq: Ahmed Yahya replacement already reflected; Ali Jasim and several starters require final availability check.

tactical_matchup.france: Wide/half-space superiority, elite finisher conversion, bench impact and late-game attack boost.
tactical_matchup.iraq: Target-forward and set-piece path retained, but low-block resilience and game-state collapse risk remain negative.

market_signal.status: public snippet retained from old baseline; no official jingcai/live same-book snapshot
market_signal.model_policy: do not fully chase market because lineup and official odds gates are missing

odds_implied_probability.source: public odds snippet retained from 20260621 baseline, not official jingcai and not live same-book snapshot

quality_notes: Direction remains France favored, but the file is partial because the 20260622 data/tactical refresh files are skeletons.
T-75m official lineup could move France xG materially if Mbappe, Olise, Barcola, Dembele or midfield protection is rotated.
Official Chinese sports lottery odds and same-source handicap/totals are missing; betting status remains discussion_only_hold.

sensitivity.impact: If two of Mbappe/Olise/Barcola/Dembele are rested or minutes-limited, France win may fall by 5-8pp and under 3.5 rises.
If Iraq stabilizes goalkeeper/low-block errors, France blowout tail falls; if early goal conceded, 3+ France goal path rises.
Market may overstate France if price shortens before lineup confirmation; use as risk signal only.

matches.venue_note: New York/New Jersey Stadium, East Rutherford

baseline_strength.notes: Norway has a small-to-moderate edge after round 1, but Senegal is not a weak-team profile.

recent_round1_form.notes: Norway beat Iraq 4-1 with Haaland/Odegaard/set-piece boost; Senegal lost 1-3 but retained transition and late scoring path.

player_state.norway: Haaland 4.8, Odegaard 3.8, Moller Wolfe 3.6 but cramp monitor, Schjelderup head-contact monitor.
player_state.senegal: Mbaye 4.0 and Jackson/Diouf positive, but Koulibaly/Gueye/Mane/Niakhaté around 2.0 after France match.

availability_and_injury.norway: No confirmed suspension; Moller Wolfe cramp, Schjelderup head collision and Odegaard load require T-75m check.
availability_and_injury.senegal: No confirmed new suspension in local files; older starters and first-round heavy minutes require final check.

tactical_matchup.norway: Haaland/Odegaard axis, aerial edge and set pieces remain strong.
tactical_matchup.senegal: Transition, wide carries and must-score pressure raise both scoring and defensive exposure.

market_signal.status: public snippet retained from old baseline; no official jingcai/live same-book snapshot
market_signal.model_policy: reduce Norway edge slightly because Senegal desperation and Norway availability monitors are unresolved

odds_implied_probability.source: public odds snippet retained from 20260621 baseline, not official jingcai and not live same-book snapshot

quality_notes: Norway remains first direction but no longer near 49%; Senegal's must-score state and transition tail are higher.
T-75m official lineup could move the match materially, especially Odegaard, Haaland, Moller Wolfe, Senegal's Jackson/Mane/Camara/Diouf roles.
Official Chinese sports lottery odds and same-source handicap/totals are missing; betting status remains discussion_only_hold.
This is a high-variance match: 1-1 is the single most likely scoreline even while Norway has the higher aggregate win probability.

sensitivity.impact: If Moller Wolfe or Odegaard is limited, Norway xG may lose 0.10-0.20 and draw/Senegal tail rises.
If Senegal must press earlier, both over 2.5 and Norway transition paths rise; if Senegal chooses a lower block, draw rises.
If first-round late fatigue repeats, Norway late-goal probability rises despite the lowered baseline.

aggregate_quality_notes: Both upstream 20260622 refresh files exist but remain skeleton/in_progress, so this is a partial-current reprediction rather than a fully refreshed live model.
No official Chinese sports lottery odds, T-75m lineups, or same-source 1X2/handicap/totals snapshot is available in local inputs.
All betting language is held at discussion_only_hold; this file gives probability structure only.
